commands.label: Audio Loopback
commands.note: Routes mic to speakers. Requires PulseAudio or PipeWire (standard on Ubuntu, Fedora, Arch).

commands.label: Wi-Fi
commands.note: Requires NetworkManager (standard on most desktop distros).

commands.label: Open Home Folder
commands.note: Opens your default file manager — works across GNOME, KDE, XFCE, and others.

commands.label: System Stats
commands.note: Streams CPU, memory, IO, and system stats every second. Part of procps — installed by default on most distros.

commands.label: Network Toolkit
commands.note: Common network diagnostics. nmap requires separate installation.
commands.content:
ip addr show
ip route
ss -tulnp
curl ifconfig.me
nmap -sn 192.168.1.0/24
